summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ALSA PRO logo implementation. Logo displays correctly in navigation and footer with proper colors, tagline, and responsive behavior across all device sizes.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu doesn't appear to open when menu button is clicked

passed_tests: Logo displays correctly in header navigation with proper dimensions (160x48px)
Logo displays correctly in footer with proper dimensions (186x56px)
ALSA text renders in correct orange color (#FF5500) - 7 orange elements found
PRO text renders in correct white color - 7 white elements found
EASY TRAINING tagline is visible and properly positioned
Logo is clickable and functional in navigation
Logo remains visible during scroll with glass navigation effect
Logo renders properly on desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844)
Logo maintains visibility across all page sections (Products, About, News, Contact)
SVG structure is correct with proper viewBox (0 0 200 60)
Diagonal stripe accents are present (8 rect elements)
Logo has good contrast against different background sections
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Mobile menu functionality - the mobile menu button doesn't properly open the navigation menu when clicked on mobile devices
